prestazioni: Engine: J35Y6 (3.5L V6 DOHC i-VTEC with direct injection) – Full bolt-on turbo system using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a PRL Motorsports intercooler kit, supporting 12 psi of boost for ~450 whp on E30 fuel blend.

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the Pilot’s 5,000 lb weight, and spherical bearing top mounts from Hardrace for improved camber retention under load.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) paired with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily clutch kit and a Fidanza lightweight flywheel to handle the increased torque, along with a K-Tuned short shifter for reduced throw distance.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and a duckbill rear wing (all pre-preg autoclave carbon), designed specifically for the Pilot’s unibody structure to reduce lift by 30%.

Wheels: Volk Racing TE37V (20x10 +25 front, 20x11 +30 rear) with custom offsets to clear the Ohlins coilovers and Brembo GT 6-piston calipers, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 305/30/20 rear).

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats with custom Alcantara upholstery (Honda-specific mounting brackets), a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with a 12.3-inch Aim MXS Strada digital dash.
